original_query: with ss as  (select ca_county,d_qoy, d_year,sum(ss_ext_sales_price) as store_sales  from store_sales,date_dim,customer_address, item  where ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk   and ss_addr_sk=ca_address_sk   and ss_item_sk = i_item_sk   and i_color IN ('purple', 'sandy')   and i_manager_id BETWEEN 36 and 55   and ss_list_price between 77 and 91   and ca_state in ('GA','IL')  group by ca_county,d_qoy, d_year),  ws as  (select ca_county,d_qoy, d_year,sum(ws_ext_sales_price) as web_sales  from web_sales,date_dim,customer_address, item  where ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk   and ws_bill_addr_sk=ca_address_sk   and ws_item_sk = i_item_sk   and i_color IN ('purple', 'sandy')   and i_manager_id BETWEEN 36 and 55   and ws_list_price between 77 and 91   and ca_state in ('GA','IL') group by ca_county,d_qoy, d_year)  select         ss1.ca_county        ,ss1.d_year        ,ws2.web_sales/ws1.web_sales web_q1_q2_increase        ,ss2.store_sales/ss1.store_sales store_q1_q2_increase        ,ws3.web_sales/ws2.web_sales web_q2_q3_increase        ,ss3.store_sales/ss2.store_sales store_q2_q3_increase  from         ss ss1        ,ss ss2        ,ss ss3        ,ws ws1        ,ws ws2        ,ws ws3  where     ss1.d_qoy = 1     and ss1.d_year = 2001     and ss1.ca_county = ss2.ca_county     and ss2.d_qoy = 2     and ss2.d_year = 2001  and ss2.ca_county = ss3.ca_county     and ss3.d_qoy = 3     and ss3.d_year = 2001     and ss1.ca_county = ws1.ca_county     and ws1.d_qoy = 1     and ws1.d_year = 2001     and ws1.ca_county = ws2.ca_county     and ws2.d_qoy = 2     and ws2.d_year = 2001     and ws1.ca_county = ws3.ca_county     and ws3.d_qoy = 3     and ws3.d_year =2001     and case when ws1.web_sales > 0 then ws2.web_sales/ws1.web_sales else null end        > case when ss1.store_sales > 0 then ss2.store_sales/ss1.store_sales else null end     and case when ws2.web_sales > 0 then ws3.web_sales/ws2.web_sales else null end        > case when ss2.store_sales > 0 then ss3.store_sales/ss2.store_sales else null end  order by store_q1_q2_increase;
rewritten_query:
with ss as (
    select 
        ca_county,
        sum(case when d_qoy = 1 then ss_ext_sales_price else 0 end) as store_sales_q1,
        sum(case when d_qoy = 2 then ss_ext_sales_price else 0 end) as store_sales_q2,
        sum(case when d_qoy = 3 then ss_ext_sales_price else 0 end) as store_sales_q3
    from 
        store_sales
        JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
        JOIN customer_address ON ss_addr_sk = ca_address_sk
        JOIN item ON ss_item_sk = i_item_sk
    where 
        i_color IN ('purple', 'sandy')
        and i_manager_id BETWEEN 36 and 55
        and ss_list_price between 77 and 91
        and ca_state in ('GA','IL')
        and d_year = 2001
        and d_qoy in (1,2,3)
    group by 
        ca_county
), 
ws as (
    select 
        ca_county,
        sum(case when d_qoy = 1 then ws_ext_sales_price else 0 end) as web_sales_q1,
        sum(case when d_qoy = 2 then ws_ext_sales_price else 0 end) as web_sales_q2,
        sum(case when d_qoy = 3 then ws_ext_sales_price else 0 end) as web_sales_q3
    from 
        web_sales
        JOIN date_dim ON ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
        JOIN customer_address ON ws_bill_addr_sk = ca_address_sk
        JOIN item ON ws_item_sk = i_item_sk
    where 
        i_color IN ('purple', 'sandy')
        and i_manager_id BETWEEN 36 and 55
        and ws_list_price between 77 and 91
        and ca_state in ('GA','IL')
        and d_year = 2001
        and d_qoy in (1,2,3)
    group by 
        ca_county
)
select 
    ss.ca_county,
    2001 as d_year,
    ws.web_sales_q2/NULLIF(ws.web_sales_q1, 0) as web_q1_q2_increase,
    ss.store_sales_q2/NULLIF(ss.store_sales_q1, 0) as store_q1_q2_increase,
    ws.web_sales_q3/NULLIF(ws.web_sales_q2, 0) as web_q2_q3_increase,
    ss.store_sales_q3/NULLIF(ss.store_sales_q2, 0) as store_q2_q3_increase
from 
    ss
    JOIN ws ON ss.ca_county = ws.ca_county
where 
    ws.web_sales_q2/NULLIF(ws.web_sales_q1, 0) > ss.store_sales_q2/NULLIF(ss.store_sales_q1, 0)
    and ws.web_sales_q3/NULLIF(ws.web_sales_q2, 0) > ss.store_sales_q3/NULLIF(ss.store_sales_q2, 0)
order by 
    store_q1_q2_increase;

rewrite_suggestion.nave_suggestion: Added filters for d_year = 2001 and d_qoy in (1,2,3) directly in the CTEs instead of filtering them in the main query, which reduces the amount of data processed in the aggregation step.

original_query: with ss as  (select ca_county,d_qoy, d_year,sum(ss_ext_sales_price) as store_sales  from store_sales,date_dim,customer_address, item  where ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk   and ss_addr_sk=ca_address_sk   and ss_item_sk = i_item_sk   and i_color IN ('cornflower', 'pink')   and i_manager_id BETWEEN 14 and 33   and ss_list_price between 137 and 151   and ca_state in ('GA','IL')  group by ca_county,d_qoy, d_year),  ws as  (select ca_county,d_qoy, d_year,sum(ws_ext_sales_price) as web_sales  from web_sales,date_dim,customer_address, item  where ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk   and ws_bill_addr_sk=ca_address_sk   and ws_item_sk = i_item_sk   and i_color IN ('cornflower', 'pink')   and i_manager_id BETWEEN 14 and 33   and ws_list_price between 137 and 151   and ca_state in ('GA','IL') group by ca_county,d_qoy, d_year)  select         ss1.ca_county        ,ss1.d_year        ,ws2.web_sales/ws1.web_sales web_q1_q2_increase        ,ss2.store_sales/ss1.store_sales store_q1_q2_increase        ,ws3.web_sales/ws2.web_sales web_q2_q3_increase        ,ss3.store_sales/ss2.store_sales store_q2_q3_increase  from         ss ss1        ,ss ss2        ,ss ss3        ,ws ws1        ,ws ws2        ,ws ws3  where     ss1.d_qoy = 1     and ss1.d_year = 2001     and ss1.ca_county = ss2.ca_county     and ss2.d_qoy = 2     and ss2.d_year = 2001  and ss2.ca_county = ss3.ca_county     and ss3.d_qoy = 3     and ss3.d_year = 2001     and ss1.ca_county = ws1.ca_county     and ws1.d_qoy = 1     and ws1.d_year = 2001     and ws1.ca_county = ws2.ca_county     and ws2.d_qoy = 2     and ws2.d_year = 2001     and ws1.ca_county = ws3.ca_county     and ws3.d_qoy = 3     and ws3.d_year =2001     and case when ws1.web_sales > 0 then ws2.web_sales/ws1.web_sales else null end        > case when ss1.store_sales > 0 then ss2.store_sales/ss1.store_sales else null end     and case when ws2.web_sales > 0 then ws3.web_sales/ws2.web_sales else null end        > case when ss2.store_sales > 0 then ss3.store_sales/ss2.store_sales else null end  order by ss1.d_year;
rewritten_query:
WITH ss AS (
  SELECT 
    ca_county,
    d_qoy, 
    d_year,
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS store_sales,
    LEAD(SUM(ss_ext_sales_price), 1) OVER (PARTITION BY ca_county, d_year ORDER BY d_qoy) AS next_q_store_sales,
    LEAD(SUM(ss_ext_sales_price), 2) OVER (PARTITION BY ca_county, d_year ORDER BY d_qoy) AS next_next_q_store_sales
  FROM store_sales
  JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
  JOIN customer_address ON ss_addr_sk = ca_address_sk
  JOIN item ON ss_item_sk = i_item_sk
  WHERE i_color IN ('cornflower', 'pink')
    AND i_manager_id BETWEEN 14 AND 33
    AND ss_list_price BETWEEN 137 AND 151
    AND ca_state IN ('GA', 'IL')
    AND d_year = 2001
    AND d_qoy IN (1, 2, 3)
  GROUP BY ca_county, d_qoy, d_year
),
ws AS (
  SELECT 
    ca_county,
    d_qoy,
    d_year,
    SUM(ws_ext_sales_price) AS web_sales,
    LEAD(SUM(ws_ext_sales_price), 1) OVER (PARTITION BY ca_county, d_year ORDER BY d_qoy) AS next_q_web_sales,
    LEAD(SUM(ws_ext_sales_price), 2) OVER (PARTITION BY ca_county, d_year ORDER BY d_qoy) AS next_next_q_web_sales
  FROM web_sales
  JOIN date_dim ON ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
  JOIN customer_address ON ws_bill_addr_sk = ca_address_sk
  JOIN item ON ws_item_sk = i_item_sk
  WHERE i_color IN ('cornflower', 'pink')
    AND i_manager_id BETWEEN 14 AND 33
    AND ws_list_price BETWEEN 137 AND 151
    AND ca_state IN ('GA', 'IL')
    AND d_year = 2001
    AND d_qoy IN (1, 2, 3)
  GROUP BY ca_county, d_qoy, d_year
)
SELECT 
  ss.ca_county,
  ss.d_year,
  ws.next_q_web_sales / NULLIF(ws.web_sales, 0) AS web_q1_q2_increase,
  ss.next_q_store_sales / NULLIF(ss.store_sales, 0) AS store_q1_q2_increase,
  ws.next_next_q_web_sales / NULLIF(ws.next_q_web_sales, 0) AS web_q2_q3_increase,
  ss.next_next_q_store_sales / NULLIF(ss.next_q_store_sales, 0) AS store_q2_q3_increase
FROM ss
JOIN ws ON ss.ca_county = ws.ca_county AND ss.d_qoy = ws.d_qoy AND ss.d_year = ws.d_year
WHERE ss.d_qoy = 1
  AND (ws.next_q_web_sales / NULLIF(ws.web_sales, 0)) > (ss.next_q_store_sales / NULLIF(ss.store_sales, 0))
  AND (ws.next_next_q_web_sales / NULLIF(ws.next_q_web_sales, 0)) > (ss.next_next_q_store_sales / NULLIF(ss.next_q_store_sales, 0))
ORDER BY ss.d_year;

rewrite_suggestion.nave_suggestion: Use window functions (LEAD) to eliminate multiple self-joins by calculating next quarter values in the same row.
Push down filter conditions (d_year = 2001 and d_qoy IN (1, 2, 3)) into the CTEs to reduce the amount of data processed early.
Use NULLIF function to handle division by zero cases more efficiently than using CASE statements.

original_query: with ss as  (select ca_county,d_qoy, d_year,sum(ss_ext_sales_price) as store_sales  from store_sales,date_dim,customer_address, item  where ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk   and ss_addr_sk=ca_address_sk   and ss_item_sk = i_item_sk   and i_color IN ('light', 'midnight')   and i_manager_id BETWEEN 81 and 100   and ss_list_price between 286 and 300   and ca_state in ('NM','TN')  group by ca_county,d_qoy, d_year),  ws as  (select ca_county,d_qoy, d_year,sum(ws_ext_sales_price) as web_sales  from web_sales,date_dim,customer_address, item  where ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk   and ws_bill_addr_sk=ca_address_sk   and ws_item_sk = i_item_sk   and i_color IN ('light', 'midnight')   and i_manager_id BETWEEN 81 and 100   and ws_list_price between 286 and 300   and ca_state in ('NM','TN') group by ca_county,d_qoy, d_year)  select         ss1.ca_county        ,ss1.d_year        ,ws2.web_sales/ws1.web_sales web_q1_q2_increase        ,ss2.store_sales/ss1.store_sales store_q1_q2_increase        ,ws3.web_sales/ws2.web_sales web_q2_q3_increase        ,ss3.store_sales/ss2.store_sales store_q2_q3_increase  from         ss ss1        ,ss ss2        ,ss ss3        ,ws ws1        ,ws ws2        ,ws ws3  where     ss1.d_qoy = 1     and ss1.d_year = 2000     and ss1.ca_county = ss2.ca_county     and ss2.d_qoy = 2     and ss2.d_year = 2000  and ss2.ca_county = ss3.ca_county     and ss3.d_qoy = 3     and ss3.d_year = 2000     and ss1.ca_county = ws1.ca_county     and ws1.d_qoy = 1     and ws1.d_year = 2000     and ws1.ca_county = ws2.ca_county     and ws2.d_qoy = 2     and ws2.d_year = 2000     and ws1.ca_county = ws3.ca_county     and ws3.d_qoy = 3     and ws3.d_year =2000     and case when ws1.web_sales > 0 then ws2.web_sales/ws1.web_sales else null end        > case when ss1.store_sales > 0 then ss2.store_sales/ss1.store_sales else null end     and case when ws2.web_sales > 0 then ws3.web_sales/ws2.web_sales else null end        > case when ss2.store_sales > 0 then ss3.store_sales/ss2.store_sales else null end  order by ss1.ca_county;
rewritten_query:
WITH ss AS (
    SELECT 
        ca_county,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d_qoy = 1 THEN ss_ext_sales_price ELSE 0 END) AS q1_store_sales,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d_qoy = 2 THEN ss_ext_sales_price ELSE 0 END) AS q2_store_sales,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d_qoy = 3 THEN ss_ext_sales_price ELSE 0 END) AS q3_store_sales
    FROM store_sales
    JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    JOIN customer_address ON ss_addr_sk = ca_address_sk
    JOIN item ON ss_item_sk = i_item_sk
    WHERE i_color IN ('light', 'midnight')
        AND i_manager_id BETWEEN 81 AND 100
        AND ss_list_price BETWEEN 286 AND 300
        AND ca_state IN ('NM', 'TN')
        AND d_year = 2000
        AND d_qoy IN (1, 2, 3)
    GROUP BY ca_county
    HAVING 
        SUM(CASE WHEN d_qoy = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 AND
        SUM(CASE WHEN d_qoy = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 AND
        SUM(CASE WHEN d_qoy = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
), ws AS (
    SELECT 
        ca_county,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d_qoy = 1 THEN ws_ext_sales_price ELSE 0 END) AS q1_web_sales,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d_qoy = 2 THEN ws_ext_sales_price ELSE 0 END) AS q2_web_sales,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d_qoy = 3 THEN ws_ext_sales_price ELSE 0 END) AS q3_web_sales
    FROM web_sales
    JOIN date_dim ON ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    JOIN customer_address ON ws_bill_addr_sk = ca_address_sk
    JOIN item ON ws_item_sk = i_item_sk
    WHERE i_color IN ('light', 'midnight')
        AND i_manager_id BETWEEN 81 AND 100
        AND ws_list_price BETWEEN 286 AND 300
        AND ca_state IN ('NM', 'TN')
        AND d_year = 2000
        AND d_qoy IN (1, 2, 3)
    GROUP BY ca_county
    HAVING 
        SUM(CASE WHEN d_qoy = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 AND
        SUM(CASE WHEN d_qoy = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 AND
        SUM(CASE WHEN d_qoy = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
)
SELECT 
    ss.ca_county,
    2000 AS d_year,
    ws.q2_web_sales / NULLIF(ws.q1_web_sales, 0) AS web_q1_q2_increase,
    ss.q2_store_sales / NULLIF(ss.q1_store_sales, 0) AS store_q1_q2_increase,
    ws.q3_web_sales / NULLIF(ws.q2_web_sales, 0) AS web_q2_q3_increase,
    ss.q3_store_sales / NULLIF(ss.q2_store_sales, 0) AS store_q2_q3_increase
FROM ss
JOIN ws ON ss.ca_county = ws.ca_county
WHERE 
    (ws.q2_web_sales / NULLIF(ws.q1_web_sales, 0)) > (ss.q2_store_sales / NULLIF(ss.q1_store_sales, 0))
    AND (ws.q3_web_sales / NULLIF(ws.q2_web_sales, 0)) > (ss.q3_store_sales / NULLIF(ss.q2_store_sales, 0))
ORDER BY ss.ca_county;

rewrite_suggestion.nave_suggestion: Optimize the query by pushing the filter on d_year=2000 and d_qoy IN (1,2,3) into the CTEs to reduce the amount of data processed during aggregation.
Pivot the data in the CTEs to have one row per county with columns for each quarter's sales, reducing the number of joins from six to two and simplifying the query structure.
Replace the complex CASE expressions for handling division by zero with NULLIF function, which is more concise while maintaining the same behavior.
